name: miasma-binding-gyp-attack-test
description: Test fixture for June 3, 2026 Miasma Phantom Gyp wave (57 packages, 286 versions). Novel delivery: a 157-byte binding.gyp file with command-substitution syntax `<!(node index.js > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo stub.c)` triggers code execution during npm install's node-gyp rebuild step WITHOUT any preinstall/postinstall script in package.json. Payload SHA-256 ef641e956f91d501b748085996303c96a64d67f63bfeef0dda175e5aa19cca90 (binding.gyp), 5926b86b642e00672252953eb30d8f75cfb7797fe3118bd6fa2cfbee92905d61 (4.5MB index.js). Exfil to github.com/liuende501 repos.
